name: Eggplant"parmesan" #2
recipeIngredient: 2 large Eggplants, peeled and sliced (thin and breaded)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. To bread the eggplant slices, combine water, soy powder, tamari, tahini, garlic powder, basil, and oregano in a bowl to make a liquid batter. In another bowl, mix the remaining dry ingredients (whole wheat flour, bread crumbs, bran, wheat germ, sesame seeds, sunflower seeds, garlic powder, basil, and oregano). Dip each eggplant slice into the liquid batter, then into the breading.
3. To make tahini sauce, place all ingredients in a blender and blend until creamy.
4. To assemble: Place a thin layer of tomato sauce on the bottom of an 8-inch x 12-inch baking dish. Add a layer of breaded eggplant, a layer of tomato sauce, and dab on a layer of cheese topping. Repeat with eggplant, sauce, and "cheese." Top with half the tahini dressing.
5. Serve with a side dish of tomato sauce.
